meaning: n.<法>[集合名词]精华,精锐,中坚分子
examples: Power is largely concentrated in the hands of a small elite.
Except for elite schools, admission standards are low.
It is not just readers who are challenging the media elite.
As many as 15% of white students admitted to elite colleges don't meet admissions standards.
Even now, the unabashed elite-worshipping that IIT graduates command in India would make Zeus blush.
